_comment: Source-of-truth registry for numerical/factual claims that appear in prose docs. sync-stats.sh computes each value from the live repo and replaces the inner text of <!-- stat:NAME --> blocks. Add a new stat here, then annotate any doc that mentions the value, and the cycle of 'change → docs lag' is mechanically broken.

verify-rules-checks.description: Number of [N/M] check sections in dev-rules/verify-rules.sh

preflight-sections.description: Number of '---- 检查 N: ' sections in dev-rules/templates/preflight.sh

rules-count.description: Number of .mdc rule files in dev-rules/rules/

commands-count.description: Number of .md command files in dev-rules/commands/

hard-constraint-rows.description: Number of soft→hard mapping rows in digital-clone-research.md §六.½ table
hard-constraint-rows.compute: awk '/^## 六.½/{flag=1; next} /^## /{flag=0} flag' digital-clone-research.md | grep -cE '^\| [^|-]'  | awk '{print $1-1}'
